## Scene 1

Alice walked into the café, her heart pounding with anticipation. The smell of fresh coffee filled the air as she looked around for a familiar face.

She spotted him at the corner table, reading a book. His dark hair fell across his forehead, and she felt a warmth spread through her chest.

"Hey," she said softly, sliding into the seat across from him.

He looked up and smiled. "You came."

"Of course I came." She couldn't help but smile back.
